name: Citrus Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix gelatin with 1/4 cup water and 1/2 cup sugar until dissolved.
2. Separate egg yolks from the egg whites; combine yolk mixture, fruit juices (lemon and orange), and remaining 1/4 cup water in a bowl.
3. Stir the yolk mixture into the gelatin mixture.
4. Cook over medium heat just until the mixture boils, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat and stir in lemon and orange peels.
6. Chill the mixture, stirring occasionally, until it mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
7. In a clean bowl, beat egg whites to soft peaks.
8. Gradually add 1/3 cup sugar to the beaten egg whites, beating to stiff peaks.
9. Gently fold the gelatin mixture into the whipped egg white batter.
10. Pour the batter into the cooled baked pastry shell and chill until firm.
11. Trim excess filling with whipped cream and thin orange slices cut into fourths.
